ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-15-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause caame on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Petitioner, Gregory Paul Eichler was sworn and examined. Court grants decree changing name to Adin Anshin Eichler. Decree signed in open court.
